purpose: Urgent discount or flash sale visual — product hero with high-urgency energy, bold color signal, countdown or scarcity aesthetic. Conversion-focused.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Urgent flash sale product photography, {featured_product} as hero item on {background_descriptor} — bold color backdrop in {sale_color} (red, electric blue, or deep orange suggesting urgency), dynamic diagonal light beams or radial starburst element in background creating energy and excitement, product slightly angled for kinetic feel not static placement, high-contrast bold graphic lighting from front key light, empty space in composition for text overlay (post-gen), clean composition that communicates urgency without chaos, hyper-realistic product detail, shot on 50mm at f/8, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: text (leave blank space for overlay)
Avoid in output: muted or soft colors (urgency requires bold contrast)
notes: Intents: harvest. Saudi adaptation guidance: Flash sales are most effective in Saudi market during 11.11, White Friday (Saudi Black Friday equivalent), Ramadan flash sales, and back-to-school. Saudi consumers respond strongly to countdown urgency aesthetics. Leave empty composition area for Arabic text overlay post-generation — Arabic discount percentages must be prominently placed. Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: Trigger-only (sale events). Compliance level: standard.
